title: Junior Business Development Manager at Mindspace Business Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Mindspace Business Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!
